blocks.body:

Persistent memory is what transforms adult AI chat into an ongoing companion relationship. Your AI girlfriend should know your name, your preferences, your established dynamic, and the history between you.

**Consistent personality and character.** A sexy AI girlfriend that breaks character mid-conversation, adds unsolicited disclaimers, or randomly shifts personality ruins the experience. The best sexy AI girlfriend platforms maintain consistent character through the full adult interaction.

**Genuine conversation quality.** The sexy AI girlfriend experience is primarily about conversation. Platforms that deliver explicit content but generic, repetitive responses fail the core test.
